calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2010 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT OPENTABLE, INC. DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained without leave to amend. All of the causes of action are time-barred. No reasonable probability that defect can be cured by amendment. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Ann Mendoza CSR # 6812

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Continued To Jan-29-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-06-2009 Continued To Dec-15-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2009 Continued To Dec-11-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-31-2009 Continued To Oct-23-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT OPENTABLE, INC. DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Appearances: David S. Secrest, Esq. of the Law Offices of David S. Secrest, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Morgan W. Tovey, Esq. and David J. Ruderman, Esq. of Quinn, Emanuel Urguhart Oliver & Hedges LLP, (415) 875-6600, appearing for defendant, and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Sustained with ten days leave to amend to show Plaintiff's causes of action accrued later than 2001 or was tolled to prevent applicable statute of limitations and applicable 2001 release agreement. Plaintiff's counsel to prepare a form of order. (302/REQ)Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay, Court Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-18-2009 Continued To Aug-28-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT OPENTABLE, INC. DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Continued to August 28, 2009 per Stipulation and Order. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-04-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT OPENTABLE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar. Amended Complaint filed. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
